must_have_quals: Bachelor's degree or equivalent practical experience, 2 years of experience with software development using programming languages such as Java, C++ or Kotlin, Experience with SQL compilers or the inner workings of query processing engines, Experience developing data warehousing (equipment tracking log) and data infrastructure solutions, including data-modeling platforms

job_summary: Google is a leading technology company that develops next-generation technologies for billions of users. They are seeking a Software Engineer III to work on Looker Modeling, focusing on enhancing data modeling capabilities and integrating AI with the BigQuery ecosystem.
